consolidationRecommendation: Yes. The post-complete hook captures mostly run-telemetry + frequent _no data captured_/unfilled-placeholder noise (10 of 22 are empty/template stubs). Recommend: (1) fix the hook to SKIP writing a file when STORY.md yields no real lesson (kills the noise at source); (2) learning-curator periodically distills durable gotchas into a single LESSONS_DIGEST.md (or promotes to CLAUDE.md Pieges connus / lib-docs LESSONS.md), then prunes source lessons >30d like STORY.md. The 2 unique high-value gotchas (W3 SAVEPOINT-under-transaction:none; @types pin needs direct devDep) should be promoted to CLAUDE.md immediately.
summary: 2 KEEP (incl SCHEMA) / 10 CONSOLIDATE / 10 DELETE. 10 stubs are empty/template; 4 fully absorbed into CLAUDE.md; 1 unique gotcha (W3 SAVEPOINT) not yet captured.
